prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-BAMBOOCOMPLETESET-4PC-AMZ Product Type: CLEANING_BRUSH Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 4pc Modern Bamboo Cleaning Supplies Kitchen Household Essentials Complete Set, Multicolor Description: Sustainable, stylish, modern and useful cleaning supplies make this four piece set from Beille household and kitchen essentials! Each item in this set features durable handles made from sustainable bamboo, offering both strength and style while minimizing environmental impact.

The dish brush and scrub brush are equipped with durable, high density bristles, easily tackling stubborn grime and grease on pots, pans, dishes and other household items, as well as floors, grout, tubs and tile too! The dish brushes can also be used to scrub vegetables or fruits, to clean cutting boards, your kitchen sink and more. Both dish brushes features an ergonomic bamboo palm handle, offering a comfortable and easy to hold grip when cleaning.

In addition to the dish brushes, this set includes a convenient shower squeegee too. Featuring a nine inch smooth and flexible TPR rubber blade and bamboo handle, it effectively removes water, ensuring a streak free finish on glass, mirrors and other smooth surfaces throughout the house.

Lastly, this cleaning supplies set also comes with a 13 inch dust pan and brush set. Beille’s dust pan and brush set will make quick work of dry messes in the kitchen, laundry room, garage, entryway, bathrooms and more. The dust pan itself is lightweight and easy to carry between spaces; it comes with a built in TPR rubber edge to improve debris collection efficiency, as well as built in teeth for removing unwanted materials from the brush.

All items except the small dish brush have built in hanging holes for convenient and tidy storage when not in use. Natural bamboo handle and confetti-like pop of color lend a modern and stylish meets organic and neutral design finish, that’s sure to look great in any space! Elevate your cleaning routine with these modern and stylish cleaning tools that combine style, practicality and sustainability all in one.

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Simply rinse off dish brush under warm water and soap of choice to keep it looking fresh; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for extended periods Search Terms: Dish brush; home and kitchen; kitchen gifts; kitchen tools; dish brush with handle; dish scrub brush; bamboo dish brush; dish cleaning brush; cleaning supplies; house warming gifts new home; dust pan; shower squeegee; new home essentials Features: - 4PC HOUSEHOLD ESSENTIALS SET: Useful, modern and stylish cleaning supplies, household and kitchen essentials for every home; set includes one shower squeegee, one dish brush, one scrub brush and dust pan and brush set - DISH BRUSHES: Heavy duty bristles are tough on stubborn grease and grime, ensuring a thorough clean for all your dishes, pots, pans and more; sustainable bamboo handle and high density bristles combine scrubbing efficiency and sustainability all in one - BAMBOO HANDLES: Kitchen dish brush, scrubber brush, shower squeegee and dust pan and brush set all feature ergonomic and sustainable bamboo handles, offering a comfortable and easy to hold grip when cleaning - MODERN DESIGN: Natural bamboo handles and pop of confetti-like color lend a stylish but organic and neutral design that will look great in any bathroom, kitchen, laundry room, garage and more - CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Simply rinse off items under warm water and soap of choice and pat dry; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for extended periods === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4-pc Bamboo Cleaning Supplies Set Multicolor

openai.item_name: Beille 4-pk Multicolor Cleaning Supplies Complete Set
